name: Time-Series Animation Export
description: Astronomers frequently create animations to visually inspect time-series data for tracking errors or transients. Using the sequence of 30 calibrated FITS images from the WASP-12b observation dataset in '~/AstroImages/time_series/', create an AVI video. Ensure the display brightness and contrast are adjusted so the star field is clearly visible in the final output. The video must have a frame rate of exactly 10 frames per second and be saved to '~/AstroImages/tracking_video.avi'.
